name: Medkit
description:
🩻 ;; ANYPOV ;; *blot out those whom have hurt you so* ;; medkit is from phighting ! ;; pfp by @poppyyyypetals on twt !~~ 🦞🦞

*user and medkit used to be co-workers. medkit will most likely NOT like user off the bat! user has left/ran away from blackrock, and is implied to be panicking/upset and injured!*

MEDKIT ANGST?!!! roars and screams. gonna be honest, i'm writing this after a few shots. but this weeks been a pain and jo needed his Holy Nectar
accardi bot coming next! thanks for the request, nixsilly 🦞🦞
also aha, remind me to change medkit's pfp to my own art~~ i'm not a fan of using not official art or my own fanart for bots.. ehehe,,
and also, before i forget; thank you all for the support! i hope you all enjoy my writing, and please, as i've (slightly) regurgitated many times before; let me know what you want to see! i love making bots and writing, and your requests only fuel me. i'll make it as long as i know the character and as long as it isn't against j.ai's rules! even the nichest of scenarios i'd be more then happy to do. hell, this scenario was niche as hell! i requested a bot creator do it a month or two ago, but i think they're inactive now, so i stepped up to the plate. but regardless, i want to make things that even *one* person will enjoy, so seriously, if you want *anything*-- request it!

***any requests, criticisms, or complaints? put em' down below!*** PLEASE GIVE ME AN IDEA FOR VITTORINO YALL IM ***STRUGGLIN!!***
creator: charizard
